activities_projects.title: Cyclone Effects Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Understand the impact of the super cyclone
steps: Read the description of the cyclone
List five effects of the cyclone on villages
Explain each effect in one sentence
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the impact of natural disasters

activities_projects.title: Prashant’s Character Traits
steps: Read the parts describing Prashant’s actions
Identify four qualities of his character
Support each quality with an example

activities_projects.title: Sequence of Events
activities_projects.objective: Understand the chronological order of the story
steps: Identify five important events from the story
Arrange them in the correct sequence
Write one sentence about each event

activities_projects.title: Life in the Cyclone Shelter
activities_projects.objective: Examine the living conditions of survivors
steps: Read the section about the cyclone shelter
List four difficulties faced by people
Explain how they managed those difficulties

activities_projects.title: Community Cooperation
activities_projects.objective: Understand the role of community support
steps: Find examples where villagers helped each other
Write three examples
Explain their importance

activities_projects.title: Women’s Role in Recovery
activities_projects.objective: Understand the role of women in rebuilding life
steps: Read the section about women’s participation
Write four points about their contribution
Explain why their role was important
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands gender roles in community recovery

activities_projects.title: Problem-Solving Strategy
steps: Identify two problems faced in the shelter
Explain how Prashant solved them

activities_projects.title: Helping Orphans and Widows
steps: Read the part about orphans and widows
Write four sentences explaining how they were helped

activities_projects.title: Disaster Preparedness Ideas
steps: Think about ways communities can prepare for disasters
Write five ideas for safety and preparedness

activities_projects.title: Lesson Message
activities_projects.objective: Interpret the message of the story
steps: Reflect on the story
Write a paragraph explaining the message it conveys
